org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow
Class Callflow

java.lang.Object
  org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bye, Cancel, InitialInvite, Passthru, ProxyBye, ProxyBye, ProxyCancel, ProxyCancel, ProxyInvite, ProxyInvite, ProxyPassthru, ProxyPassthru, ProxyReinvite, ProxyReinvite, Reinvite
public abstract class Callflow
extends Object
implements Serializable

makeReliable

public javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse makeReliable(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse response)
Marks the response to be sent 'reliably', meaning you should expect at PRACK request.

Parameters:
response -
Returns:

withholdResponse

public void withholdResponse(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse response)
Mark the response as 'withheld' to prevent the method sendResponse() from actually sending the message. This gives the user the ability to prevent an automatically created response in the B2BUA or Proxy APIs from being sent back upstream.

Parameters:
response -

sendResponse

public void sendResponse(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse response,
                         Callback<javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest> lambdaFunction)
                  throws ServletException,
                         IOException
Send a response back upstream and expect an ACK/PRACK.

Parameters:
response -
lambdaFunction -
Throws:
ServletException
IOException

sendResponse

public void sendResponse(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse response)
                  throws ServletException,
                         IOException
Send a response back upstream and do not expect and ACK/PRACK. If one is received, it will be absorbed by the framework without exception.

Parameters:
response -
Throws:
ServletException
IOException
